channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Vandalism playground, 19th March
item.description:
Playground has been destroyed. It seems someone put it on fire.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4-5 cm deep pothole, 19th March
item.description:
Pothole damaging tyres

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Pothole causing damage to vehicles.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Park, Greater London

item.description:
Fly tipping of building waste will grow if not removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Bickley, Greater London

item.title: Missing cover drainage, 19th March
item.description:
Danger for pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Park, Greater London

Removal of fly tipped packaging boxes

item.title: Dumped rubbish on pavement and road, 19th March

item.title: Estate cleaning needed, 19th March
item.description:
Estate needs cleaning. Hasn't been cleaned ina while
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Loddiges Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly Tipping inside Hackney Housing Building

item.title: Bin overflowing, 19th March
item.description:
The bin is overflowing again and litter is on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Champion Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Issue with FIXED POTHOLE - tarmac used has blocked the drain, 19th March
item.description:
Fixed pothole by drain, near the entrance to the play area. All they have done by FILLING the POTHOLE is let all the tarmac fill up the drain almost halfway across. Shocking FIX.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Need to be removed, 19th March
item.description:
This 2 cars with no Road tax no insurance on it. The owner using them as storage for different Rubbish materials.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End of Christchurch Avenue near to the junction of Willesden Lane, 19th March
item.description:
Several paving slabs broken, located at the end of Christchurch Avenue near to the junction of Willesden Lane (outside the Christchurch Ave entrance of Sherwood - no door numbers on this end of Christchurch Ave). Previously logged via 9010715 but rejected
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of gravel and stones left on grass verge, 19th March
item.description:
Piles of large stones and gravel left on the grass verge since gas main repairs carried out at number 51 necessitating digging up the verge and pavement for pipework access. This is preventing the grass from recovering and regrowing and is spoiling the pleasing appearance of the verge for all to enjoy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaumont Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti flyposting sticker needs removing here please, 19th March
item.description:
Graffiti flyposting sticker needs removing here please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Grove Park Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed van with cut tow rope, 19th March
item.description:
Untaxed van with cut tow rope still attached, dumped between 7 Brookmead Ave and 9 The Fairway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookmead Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street litter, 19th March
item.description:
Lots of litter on the pavement up this end of Havil St. Needs a thorough clean.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 221, Havil Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling on Pardoner street, 19th March
item.description:
There is dog fouling on the footpath on Pardoner street next to Geoffrey House. It has been there one day and requires removal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pardoner Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Column No 64 Elmers End Rd and also No’s 1 & 2 St.Margarets Road, 19th March
item.description:
These have been reported before and keep coming back as ‘Fixed’. They have all been out for several months, there was an attempt to rectify No 64 by changing its LED lamp BUT still didn’t work. Perhaps there is an underground cable fault affecting all three columns that are in close proximity of each other ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Margaret's Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped nitreous oxide containers, 19th March
item.description:
Need removing - eyesore

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Court Yard, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Column No 41 Croydon Road Beckenham, 19th March
item.description:
LED lamp not on at night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
